creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA384

Hi Martin.
What you wrote is partially correct.
devel/gdb installs ${LOCALBASE}/bin/gdb761, but there is the option
GDB_LINK (enabled by default) that installs also a symbolic link called
${LOCALBASE}/bin/gdb. It means that "normally" ${LOCALBASE}/bin/gdb is
installed by gdb.

that is a wish of ports depending on gdb that wants to add the
dependency without including a unuseful version number. Otherwise, this
Makefile should be updated when gdb is updated and it's not needed.

Best regards,
Luca
